SS2_ITEM_RELICOFDUALITY_LORE:
Hmm? Oh, Youngling! You es back sooner quam expected. Habesne completed your search?

Oh, dear. Youngling, why are you shivering? Habetne something hurt you?

You found something quod hurt you? Hmm. Peculiar. Habesne it cum you, still?

...I see. Sine me look at it, tunc. Come now, et show me what you've found.

Hmm. A strange thing, this one. A blazing fire, sed cold to the touch. Quam unnatural, this est. There's a certain harmony to it, however. Sicut the heat brings warmth et life, the cold tempers it, et keeps it in check. Sed in that same way, that bitter cold may bring despair et death sine the heat to stave it off.

...Oh, sed there I go, rambling once more. You need to be taken care of, Youngling. Please, come cum me.
SS2_ITEM_RELICOFEXTINCTION_PICKUP: A black hole follows you quod deals extreme damage, SED it can damage you.
SS2_ITEM_RELICOFFORCE_DESC: All attacks strike <style=cIsDamage>1</style> <style=cStack>(+1 per stack)</style> additional time pro <style=cIsDamage>5%</style> TOTAL damage. <style=cIsUtility>Consecutive strikes</style> to the same enemy increase damage dealt by <style=cIsDamage>5%</style>, usque ad maximum of <style=cIsDamage>100%</style> TOTAL damage dealt. <style=cDeath>Reduce attack speed et increase skill cooldowns by 40%</style> <style=cStack>(-40% per stack)</style>.
SS2_ITEM_RELICOFFORCE_PICKUP: All attacks strike an additional time. <style=cDeath>Lowered attack speed et increased skill cooldowns</style>.
SS2_ITEM_RELICOFFORCE_LORE:
Ah, Youngling! You have returned once more, cum what seems to be a full bag, too! Full of scavengings, yes?

Hmm. The pack est heavy, sed it est nearly empty. You... You are not hiding things from me, Youngling?

...You found something very heavy. I see. Forgive me pro my suspicions. Show me this thing you have found.

Ah! You are correct, Youngling. This thing est small, sed difficult to hold. It splinters et fragments, et each piece est just as heavy as the whole. What a remarkable thing, this est!

I will put it cum the other wonderful things you have found. A thing like this could be dangerous si it fell into the wrong hands. As pro you, Youngling... Hmm, I believe some repairs pro your bag sunt in order. Come cum me.
SS2_ITEM_RELICOFMASS_DESC: <style=cIsHealing>Increase maximum health</style> by <style=cIsHealing>100%</style> <style=cStack>(+100% per stack)</style>. <style=cDeath>Reduce acceleration et deceleration</style> by a factor of <style=cDeath>8</style> <style=cStack>(+8 per stack)</style>.
SS2_ITEM_RELICOFMASS_PICKUP: Double your max health. <style=cDeath>Your movement habet momentum</style>.
SS2_ITEM_RELICOFMASS_LORE:
Ah, welcome back! Youngling, what habes you found?

Hmmm. More scavengings ex the blasted heath? Very well. You may keep those things, si you wish. Habesne found anything else?

Ah, you have? Sine me see it tunc, youngling.

Oh! This shape quod you've found! It est stalwart, sed non loyalis. Powerfulis, sed tamen etiam fragilis eodem tempore. It est a peculiar shape, ad dicere minimum of it. Ubi did you find this, youngling?

...You found it on the planet? Hmm. Worrisome. This erat non created by those sandfolk. Too complex, too powerful. Nec by those Lemurians. Dic mihi, youngling, you did not steal this, did you?

...You did not. I see. Very well. I would like to keep this shape. This shape est dangerous si you do not understand it.

Oh, my youngling, do not look sic saddened. This shape est remarkable, et I laud your work regardless of this. I simply want to keep it safe. Here, fortasse a reward est in order. Come cum me.
SS2_ITEM_RELICOFTERMINATION_DESC: Every <style=cIsUtility>30 seconds</style>, grants a buff quod <style=cIsDamage>marks</style> the next spawning enemy. If defeated intra <style=cIsUtility>30 seconds</style> <style=cStack>(-10% per stack)</style>, they <style=cIsDamage>drop an item</style> <style=cStack>(item rarity scales cum stacks)</style>; si non, they drop <style=cIsDamage>nothing</style> et delay the next mark. <style=cDeath>Marked enemies habent significantly increased stats</style>.
SS2_ITEM_RELICOFTERMINATION_PICKUP: Every 30 seconds, mark an enemy et strengthen them. If defeated in time, they drop an item; si non, they drop nothing.
SS2_ITEM_RELICOFTERMINATION_LORE:
Youngling! Ah, I am sic excited to see you return! Habesne found anything novam?

Oh? You have! Do show me, little one. There's non need to be shy.

Hm... What habes you found this time? It's sturdy et hollow, sed when you shake it... it sloshes, sicut an overripe nutapple. What a strange shape we have here...

Oh? Oh my. You were chased ab a monster, you say... It did not follow you here, correct?

...It did not. Sed of course, it would be hard to find us here, would it non, Youngling?

Here, I will take this away. Somewhere ubi it can bring no monsters to us.

...I understand. It est okay to be afraid sometimes, sed you cannot let it overwhelm you. Would it non be cruel to another wanderer to find this shape, et suffer dearly pro it?

We will be safe here, Youngling. Come cum me. You must be hungry after being out pro sic long.
SS2_ITEM_RELICOFECHELON_DESC: Gain 150 (+150 per stack) base damage et 5000 (+5000 per stack) base health pro 8 seconds on use. Using an equipment permanently increases eius cooldown by 15%
SS2_ITEM_RELICOFECHELON_PICKUP: Gain a massive buff on equipment use. <style=cDeath>Using an equipment permanently increases its cooldown</style>.
SS2_ITEM_RELICOFECHELON_LORE: No no Youngling, you es here too soon! I haven't the time to prepare. Please...Come back later.
SS2_ITEM_PRIMAL_BIRTHRIGHT_DESC: Grants <style=cIsUtility>1</style> <style=cStack>(+1 per stack)</style> Legendary Chest <style=cIsUtility>on each stage</style>, <style=cDeath>sed you cannot leave sine claiming your birthright</style>.
SS2_ITEM_PRIMAL_BIRTHRIGHT_PICKUP: Grants a Legendary Chest on each stage, <style=cDeath>sed you cannot leave sine claiming your birthright</style>.
SS2_ITEM_PRIMAL_BIRTHRIGHT_LORE:
The symbols on the parchment sunt foreign to you. You do not understand what they are, sed somehow, you understand the meaning they carry. Potestas. Voluntas. Auctoritas, et a message. 

"The right to rule est earned per strength et wit, et those alone. It cannot be granted ab alio. It cannot be granted by birth nor blood. Only strength justifies itself."
You look back down. The flickering lights of the hull cast strange shapes in the shard. Reflected shadows against its glow, coalescing into shapes quod coalesce into figures.

Two shadows stumble aimlessly around in the reflection, contra the backdrop of dawn. Short, stubby shadows. A seed falls into one's hair, et it laughs et plants it back into the soil. A seed falls into another's hands. It gently pries the thing open, to learn what will grow.

The shadows lengthen sicut the sun moves per the sky. Long, imposing shadows against twilight. Positioned perfectly, sicut an eerie gate to the light.

One shadow incipit to grow faster still, stretching until the whole world est a blanket of darkness. The lone shadow thrashes against its prison, indistinguishable contra the sea of blackness, fiercely refusing to fade away.

One shadow manet in the light. It stands in front of the now rising sun, eclipsing its light. Radii of golden sun wrap around it, forming a coronal halo pro the shadow. Standing out starkly against the world around it- blinding, searing, formless. Selfish. It does not move.

You squint your eyes, et the symbols hold a new meaning.

"It isn't fair."
